title: Attributions to Acceptable Solutions
full_text:
1.1.3.1 Attributions to Acceptable Solutions
Attributions to Acceptable Solutions
1) For the purpose of compliance with this Code as required in
Clause 1.2.1.1.(1)(b) of Division A, the objective and functional statements attributed to
the acceptable solutions in Division B shall be the objective and functional statements
identified in Sections 3.5., 4.5., 5.5., 6.5., 7.5., 8.5. and 10.2. (See Note A-1.1.3.1.(1).)

sentences.text: For the purpose of compliance with this Code as required in Clause 1.2.1.1.(1)(b) of Division A, the objective and functional statements attributed to the acceptable solutions in Division B shall be the objective and functional statements identified in Sections 3.5., 4.5., 5.5., 6.5., 7.5., 8.5. and 10.2. (See Note A-1.1.3.1.(1).)
